title: Junior Software Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Nemetschek Group is a renowned global organization with a rich legacy spanning over fifty years. Listed on the MDAX and TecDAX stock exchanges in Germany, it stands as a leader in digital transformation within the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AEC/O) industry. The company specializes in providing intelligent software solutions that support the entire lifecycle of construction and infrastructure projects. With a focus on innovation and technology, Nemetschek Group empowers its customers to plan, design, build, manage, and operate buildings and infrastructure efficiently and sustainably. Its commitment to digitalization helps clients optimize project workflows, improve collaboration, and achieve higher levels of productivity and quality across various sectors.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are currently seeking a Junior Software Developer \\- UI to join our team at Nemetschek India, Bangalore. In this role, you will play a vital part in designing, developing, and maintaining user interfaces for Allplan’s desktop applications using C\\#/WPF. Your primary responsibility will be to transform design concepts, wireframes, and prototypes into functional, visually appealing UI components that enhance user experience. You will work closely with cross\\-functional teams, including designers, senior developers, QA, and product managers, to ensure seamless integration of UI features and adherence to usability and design standards. This position offers an excellent opportunity for individuals eager to grow their skills in UI development within a dynamic, innovation\\-driven environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess some professional or internship experience in UI or software development, preferably with a focus on C\\#/WPF. A foundational understanding of UI design principles, modern application practices, and user\\-centered design is essential. Candidates should be eager to learn, ask questions, and actively contribute to team efforts. Attention to detail, strong problem\\-solving skills, and a commitment to usability and visual consistency are crucial. Proficiency in English is required, and knowledge of additional languages will be considered an advantage. A proactive attitude and a desire for continuous improvement will help candidates succeed and grow within our organization.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Implement and maintain UI components in C\\#/WPF, ensuring compliance with design and UX guidelines.
* Translate prototypes and wireframes into functional, user\\-friendly desktop application interfaces.
* Participate in code reviews to uphold UI standards and best practices.
* Debug and troubleshoot UI\\-related issues, enhancing usability and application performance.
* Collaborate with designers, senior developers, QA, and product management to clarify requirements and refine UI solutions.
* Continuously develop UI skills through training, feedback, and industry best practices.
* Contribute to process improvements and the adoption of new tools to streamline UI development workflows.


**Benefits**
 At Nemetschek India, we foster a young, dynamic, and innovation\\-oriented environment that encourages creativity and growth. Employees have the opportunity to work on a diverse range of projects across different industries, gaining valuable experience and expanding their skillsets. Our open and informal culture promotes knowledge sharing, collaboration, and continuous learning. We support personal initiative and provide clear pathways for career development and progression. Our competitive compensation packages come with a range of fringe benefits designed to enhance your well\\-being and work\\-life balance. Joining our team means becoming part of a forward\\-thinking organization committed to your professional and personal growth.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Nemetschek India is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where diversity is valued and all employees are treated with respect and fairness. We do not discriminate based on race, gender, age, religion, national origin, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe that a diverse team drives innovation and creativity, and we are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates.

Proficiency in modern front\\-end technologies such as TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6\\+), HTML5, CSS3, and SCSS/SASS is essential. Experience working with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and JSON data handling is required. Familiarity with responsive design frameworks such as Bootstrap and Material Design is also important.  Benefits
 



 At LTM, we offer a comprehensive benefits package designed to support our employees' well\\-being and professional growth. Our package includes competitive salary structures, performance\\-based incentives, and health insurance coverage. Additionally, employees have access to continuous learning opportunities, technical training, and career development programs. We also provide a collaborative and inclusive work environment that encourages innovation, recognition, and personal achievement. Other benefits include paid leave, wellness programs, and employee engagement activities aimed at fostering a positive workplace culture.
 



  





  





  





  





  





 Equal Opportunity
 



 LTM is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace where all employees are valued and respected. We do not discriminate based on race, gender, age, religion, national origin, disability, or any other protected characteristic. Our hiring practices are designed to promote fairness and equal opportunity, ensuring that all qualified candidates have access to employment and advancement opportunities. We believe that diversity enhances our innovation and success, and we strive to maintain an environment where everyone can thrive and contribute their best.

 SII Group India is a leading provider of innovative technology solutions and services, dedicated to delivering excellence in software development, testing, and digital transformation. **About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Test Automation Engineer to join our dynamic team at SII Group India. In this role, you will play a pivotal part in enhancing our product quality through the development and implementation of robust automated testing frameworks. Your expertise will ensure the reliability, performance, and security of our cutting\\-edge Runtime Security solutions. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in test automation, API testing, performance testing, and experience working with modern tools and cloud environments. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to innovative security products while working in a collaborative and forward\\-thinking environment.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field. They should have at least 5 years of hands\\-on experience in test automation, with a focus on Java or Python. Additionally, a minimum of 2 years of experience in end\\-to\\-end automation using tools like Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright is required. Strong knowledge of API testing and automation, coupled with experience in performance testing using tools such as JMeter or Locust, is essential. Candidates should have demonstrated experience designing and executing various types of tests, including integration, system, and performance tests. Familiarity with building scalable automation frameworks, containerization technologies like Docker, and orchestration with Kubernetes is highly desirable. Hands\\-on experience with Linux/shell scripting, understanding of networking protocols, and cloud platform management (AWS, Azure, GCP) will be advantageous. A solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines and integrating automated tests into these workflows is also necessary. Knowledge of authentication protocols will be considered an added advantage.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Build and maintain a comprehensive test automation framework tailored to our Runtime Security solutions, ensuring it is scalable, maintainable, and reliable. Understand the product functionalities in detail to derive precise testing requirements and develop test cases accordingly. Collaborate closely with development and product management teams to identify needs for new tools or enhancements to existing tools that support quality objectives. Conduct thorough reviews of test cases to ensure requirements traceability and adequate coverage. Assist development teams in defining clear quality goals and acceptance criteria for releases. Contribute to the creation and implementation of quality processes, standards, and best practices across the organization. Regularly produce detailed status reports and quality metrics to track testing progress and product reliability. Support continuous improvement initiatives by providing insights and recommendations based on testing outcomes. Ensure seamless integration of automated tests within CI/CD pipelines to facilitate rapid and reliable product releases. Work proactively to identify potential issues early in the development cycle and collaborate on solutions to mitigate risks.
   

  

**Benefits**
 SII Group India offers a competitive salary package complemented by comprehensive health insurance, retirement plans, and performance\\-based incentives. Employees have access to ongoing training and professional development programs to enhance their skills and career growth. The company promotes a healthy work\\-life balance through flexible working hours and remote work options. Additionally, employees benefit from a vibrant corporate culture that encourages innovation, collaboration, and recognition. Opportunities for international exposure and participation in cutting\\-edge projects are also part of our employee value proposition. We are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where diversity is celebrated, and every employee feels valued and empowered.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 SII Group India is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment where all employees are treated with respect and dignity. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. Our hiring practices are based solely on merit and qualifications, ensuring that every individual has an equal chance to succeed and grow within our organization.

 Embedded Linux Application Development
 



 • Design, develop, and maintain embedded Linux application software in C/C\\+\\+ for connected embedded devices.
 



 • Build user\\-space software involving processes, threads, IPC, system services, configuration handling, logging, diagnostics, and networking.
 



 • Develop software components for communication, device control, telemetry, local services, diagnostics, and product\\-level orchestration.
 



 • Support performance optimization related to startup behaviour, memory usage, CPU efficiency, and runtime stability.
 



 Yocto / OpenEmbedded Build Ownership
 



 • Customize and maintain Yocto / OpenEmbedded builds for target products.
 



 • Create and modify BitBake recipes, manage packages, configure images, and support layer\\-based build organization.
 



 • Integrate third\\-party libraries, middleware, and platform services into product images.
 



 • Troubleshoot build issues, dependency conflicts, package inclusion problems, and image reproducibility concerns.
 



 • Support release image generation, versioning, and handoff to test/manufacturing teams.
 



 Platform Integration \\& Debugging
 



 • Support software running on embedded Linux SoCs / microprocessor\\-based platforms, including deployment and debugging on target hardware.
 



 • Work with cross\\-compilation environments, SDKs, and embedded toolchains.
 



 • Participate in board bring\\-up, platform integration, and system\\-level issue resolution.
 



 • Use serial consoles, shell tools, logs, GDB, and standard debugging utilities for root\\-cause analysis.
 



 • Work with hardware teams where required to diagnose integration issues using oscilloscopes, logic analysers, and protocol analysers.
 



  





 Connectivity \\& Device Features
 



 • Develop and troubleshoot software for TCP/IP\\-based connected devices.
 



 • Support secure communication, telemetry, provisioning, diagnostics, and remote management workflows.
 



 • Contribute to OTA / software update workflows and device configuration management.
 



 • Support integration of product communication requirements across Linux software and, where needed, lower\\-level firmware components.
 



 Cross\\-Team Collaboration
 



 • Collaborate with engineers working on Embedded C / RTOS / bare\\-metal firmware to define interfaces between Linux\\-managed and MCU\\-managed subsystems.
 



 • Work with hardware, QA, systems, and compliance stakeholders to support validation and release readiness.
 



 • Participate in code reviews, design discussions, defect triage, and technical documentation activities.
 



 Compliance, Quality \\& Release Support
 



 • Follow engineering practices suitable for industrial, high\\-reliability, and compliance\\-sensitive products.
 



 • Maintain documentation, version control hygiene, release traceability, and disciplined software change management.
 



 • Develop documentation required for UL/IEC/FCC/CE regulatory compliance.
 



 • Support validation, manufacturing readiness, and sustaining engineering activities as needed.
 



 \\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_
 



 Qualifications
 



 • Experience: 7–10 years in Embedded Linux software development for industrial systems and network connected audio systems.
 



 • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electronics, Electrical Engineering, or related.
 



 • Strong expertise in Embedded C/C\\+\\+.
 



 • Working knowledge of Python and Shell scripting.
 



 • Hands\\-on experience with Audio systems, codecs, or DSP concepts preferred, SIP or multicast streaming preferred, Wireless protocols (Zigbee, BLE)
 



 • Experience with secure device connectivity (MQTT/TLS) preferred.
 



 • Strong debugging, problem\\-solving, and system\\-level thinking skills.
 



 • Practical experience with Yocto / OpenEmbedded, including: BitBake, recipe updates, package/image customization, layer configuration, build/debug troubleshooting.
 



 • Experience with cross\\-compilation, embedded toolchains, and debugging on target hardware.
 



 • Good debugging and analytical skills with ability to isolate issues across application, OS, and build layers
 



 • Ability to collaborate effectively in cross\\-functional Agile teams.
 



 • Prior experience in regulated, safety\\-critical, or high\\-reliability domains preferred.
 



 \\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_\\_
 



 Preferred Experience:
 



 • Experience owning or supporting custom embedded Linux distributions
 



 • Exposure to ARM\\-based embedded platforms, boot flow, device tree, bootloader, or BSP collaboration
 



 • Experience in audio, paging, intercom, industrial communication, emergency notification, or other networked embedded products
 



 • Exposure to wireless technologies such as BLE, Zigbee, LoRa / LoRaWAN, or mesh
 



 • Experience with CI/CD, automated build pipelines, or release engineering for embedded Linux systems
 



 • Exposure to regulated, high\\-reliability, or safety\\-oriented product environments

 Tech Stack \\& Tools
 



 • Programming: C, C\\+\\+, Python, Shell scripting
 



 • Embedded Linux: Linux user\\-space development, system services, IPC, networking, debugging
 



 • Build \\& Distribution: Yocto, OpenEmbedded, BitBake, cross\\-compilation toolchains, SDKs
 



 • Connectivity: TCP/IP, MQTT/TLS, secure remote connectivity, OTA/update mechanisms
 



 • Version Control: Git / GitHub
 



 • Debug Tools: GDB, serial console, logs, oscilloscope, logic analyser, protocol analysers
